message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Negotiate a more favorable payment structure for the Phase Agreement.",
      "leverage": "A flexible payment schedule can help manage cash flow and incentivize timely delivery.",
      "proposed_language": "For delivery on or before the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement, Company shall pay to Developer [insert number] % of the price for that Phase upon delivery and an additional [insert number] % upon successful completion of the acceptance tests.",
      "rationale": "This structure aligns payments with performance, ensuring that the Developer is motivated to meet quality standards before receiving full payment.",
      "priority": "high",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.7",
      "source_clause_id": "ca82a980-4f6d-4df8-9bde-a0a43a31b0d4",
      "source_excerpt": "For delivery on or before the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the price for that Phase.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "objective": "Establish clearer acceptance test criteria.",
      "leverage": "Clear criteria can reduce disputes and ensure both parties have aligned expectations.",
      "proposed_language": "The Acceptance test will follow those standards listed in Annex II and shall include specific performance metrics agreed upon by both parties.",
      "rationale": "Defining specific metrics will help ensure that the software meets the Company's needs and reduce the risk of rejection due to vague criteria.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.4",
      "source_clause_id": "77912e9c-8858-4762-93f9-92bc1f63dbcb",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon approval of the programming specifications, Developer design, in conjunction with Company, an Acceptance test for these specifications. The Acceptance test will follow those standards listed in Annex II.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "objective": "Add penalties for late delivery to ensure accountability.",
      "leverage": "Penalties can incentivize timely delivery and protect the Company's interests.",
      "proposed_language": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs within [insert number] months after the original delivery date, Developer shall incur a penalty of [insert percentage]% of the total Phase price for each week of delay.",
      "rationale": "This clause will encourage the Developer to prioritize timely delivery and provide the Company with recourse in case of delays.",
      "priority": "high",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "fbca1200-9bae-4a0a-8990-7b76afcf59c1",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "objective": "Ensure ongoing communication and updates during the development process.",
      "leverage": "Regular updates can help identify issues early and foster collaboration.",
      "proposed_language": "Developer shall provide bi-weekly updates to Company regarding the progress of the programming specifications and any potential issues.",
      "rationale": "This will help maintain transparency and allow for timely adjustments to the project scope or timeline if necessary.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.1",
      "source_clause_id": "72ea692b-942c-44ee-b0a7-c1d39d22b7cb",
      "source_excerpt": "Developer shall consult with Company personnel for the purpose of designing programming specifications. Specifications shall contain those items listed on Annex I.",
      "confidence": 0.70
    }
  ]
}
